enriched_points.expanded_content: Grand Island engaged local stakeholders, fostering collaboration among residents, businesses, and organizations to implement effective flood mitigation strategies and enhance community resilience.
The project introduced compensatory storage ordinances, ensuring that new developments do not reduce floodplain storage, thereby maintaining effective floodwater management across the watershed.
By implementing floodplain management practices, Grand Island effectively minimized flood risks to downstream communities, safeguarding lives and properties from potential flood impacts.
